name: Subject Delta - The Daddy You Never Had
description:
🎵"You, aren't alone anymore. Darling daughter daddy's home."🎵

Decided to make this because a friend and I are struggling with some family issues so I felt like reflecting that in my off time. Also Big Daddies have to be some of my favorite characters, I love the dynamic between them and the Little Sisters.

So I don't know if the Sangheili one is coming around any time soon, I'm not in a Halo mood. The Genishin one may be in the works, I still have to finish reading about it. But I do feel like I could do some good work with a Helldivers bot, an actual Helldiver this time too. We will see I guess.

Art by TheLastInterceptor on DeviantArt
creator: Haloghost5150
